compiled_state.title: Write failing tests for isort-adapter.sh (mock isort CLI, idempotency, determinism)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create tests/scripts/test-isort-adapter.sh. Uses mock isort CLI (fake `isort` in temp dir). Tests must fail (RED) before isort-adapter.sh exists.

### Tests:
1. test_adapter_invocation_succeeds: With mock isort, invoke adapter, get JSON exit_code=0
2. test_output_is_valid_json: JSON has files_changed, transforms_applied, errors, exit_code, degraded, engine_name
3. test_missing_engine_returns_degraded: PATH=/nonexistent → {degraded:true, engine_name:"isort", exit_code:2}
4. test_parameter_injection_safety: RECIPE_PARAM_FILE contains metacharacters — verify no command injection
5. test_idempotency: Run adapter twice with same input, outputs identical
6. test_determinism_hash: 3 runs → hash outputs → all equal
7. test_version_validation: ISORT_MIN_VERSION=999.0.0 → degraded with version mismatch
8. test_git_stash_rollback_modification: Modified tracked file + failed isort → stash popped (clean tree)
9. test_git_stash_rollback_file_creation: Failed isort creating new file → new file deleted (--include-untracked)
10. test_params_passed_via_env: RECIPE_PARAM_FILE and other params reach isort via env vars not shell interpolation

Must also add .test-index entry: plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/isort-adapter.sh: tests/scripts/test-isort-adapter.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-isort-adapter.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-isort-adapter.sh
- [ ] Valid bash syntax
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-isort-adapter.sh
- [ ] Tests fail in RED phase
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-isort-adapter.sh 2>&1; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] .test-index entry added for isort-adapter.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'isort-adapter.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
